name: EnterpriseAgent Agent Development Stage Checklists

stages.name: 账号、组织、会话与权限基础
stages.commit_message: feat(server): implement auth org permission foundation

stages.name: 扩展主档、版本、授权范围、可见性、搜索与统计
stages.commit_message: feat(server): implement extension catalog scope statistics

stages.name: 发布申请、系统预审、审核、审计与通知
stages.commit_message: feat(server): implement submission precheck review notification

stages.name: 包存储、下载凭证、安全校验与文件预览
stages.commit_message: feat(server): implement package storage download security preview

stages.name: 桌面客户端后端基础、本地数据库与 IPC
stages.commit_message: feat(client): initialize desktop backend localdb ipc

stages.name: 本地执行器、Tool Adapter、Skill/MCP/Plugin 本地执行
stages.commit_message: feat(client): implement local executor tool adapters extension execution

stages.name: 设备、客户端更新、备份恢复、部署与最终验收
stages.commit_message: feat(ops): implement device update backup deploy acceptance

usage_rule: Agent must update checkboxes and completion records after each verified task. Unverified items must remain unchecked.
